browser_path.description: Absolute path to a local Chromium or Chrome executable.
browser_path.hint: Leave empty to use the default browser lookup in the Playwright renderer.

site_dir.description: Absolute path to the dice web app directory.
site_dir.hint: Leave empty to use the plugin's rollmydice_app directory.

render_preset.hint: Use `fast` on low-power Linux/ARM devices to reduce render time.

default_duration_ms.hint: The value is clamped in plugin code. Leave it unset to use the selected preset.

default_fps.hint: The value is clamped in plugin code. Leave it unset to use the selected preset.

render_width.description: Browser viewport width used for rendering.
render_width.hint: The value is clamped in plugin code. Leave it unset to use the selected preset.

render_height.description: Browser viewport height used for rendering.
render_height.hint: The value is clamped in plugin code. Leave it unset to use the selected preset.

linux_render_mode.hint: Use `auto` to try headless first and fall back to xvfb on Linux. Use `xvfb` when your Chromium build cannot initialize WebGL in true headless mode.
